strengths: ~20 years of polyglot engineering experience (web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure, low-latency systems) comfortably exceeds the 15-year minimum
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq — including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks — demonstrates current builder fluency in the AI space

Entrepreneurial track record: founded and shipped GISCollective (open-source, Kubernetes-deployable geo-platform) and scaled an iOS/Apple TV app to top-10 in the US at WatchUp, signaling an owner mindset
concerns: AI expertise is nascent and narrow — the only demonstrable AI work began in April 2025; no history of shipping AI-powered products or platforms at scale prior to the current role
No advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI or related field, and the two undergraduate degrees are unrelated to AI/ML, leaving a gap against the strongly preferred qualification
No evidence of director-level IC scope: strategic customer advisory, cross-organizational technical influence, public AI thought leadership, or internal inspiration at the scale the role demands
response.justification: Bogdan is a strong hands-on engineer with genuine range across systems levels and a proven ability to build and ship, but the role is a director-level AI strategy position that requires deep, demonstrated AI expertise, a track record of influencing customers and partners at an organizational level, and ideally an advanced AI credential — none of which are clearly present. His AI work is real but very recent, and his career history reads as a senior individual contributor rather than a strategic advisor or technical executive, making the fit for this specific Principal Engineer — AI Strategy role marginal at this time.
